title: EPIC: Phase 3 - Pattern Suggestions UI (Thoughtful Colleague)
description: Implement pattern suggestions with collapsed badge UI, suggestion cards, and feedback system. Issue #300 Phase 3. Estimated 5.5 hours total.

title: Phase 3.1: Backend Integration - Wire get_suggestions()
description: Add suggestions field to IntentProcessingResult. Call learning_handler.get_suggestions() in IntentService.process_intent(). Return suggestions in orchestration response. Est: 1 hour.

title: Phase 3.2: Frontend UI Core - Badge + Panel + Cards
description: Create collapsed notification badge. Build expandable suggestion panel. Implement suggestion cards with confidence bars. Add Accept/Reject/Dismiss buttons. Wire up click handlers. Est: 2 hours.

title: Phase 3.3: First-Time Onboarding - Tooltip
description: Add first-time user tooltip on badge. Implement learn more modal with explanation. Use localStorage to track seen state. Est: 30 minutes.

title: Phase 3.4: Feedback Endpoint - POST /patterns/{id}/feedback
description: Create PatternFeedbackRequest Pydantic model. Implement POST /patterns/{id}/feedback endpoint. Handle Accept (confidence *= 1.1), Reject (confidence *= 0.5), Dismiss (no change). Update pattern confidence and counts. Est: 1 hour.

title: Phase 3.5: Manual Testing - 6 Scenarios
description: Test: (1) Badge appears with patterns (2) Panel expands/collapses (3) Accept increases confidence (4) Reject decreases confidence (5) Dismiss works (6) First-time tooltip shows. Document all evidence. Est: 1 hour.
